tear_logic.note: Refine into Nanites. If no refiner and inventory > 80%, shed a Golden Tear.
The Dragon hoards maps it never follows. Sell surplus above 20.
Dragon's Eye active. High market value material.
Pure liquid asset. No crafting utility. Sell at the next trade terminal.
Unless base building, discard or sell the earth you've displaced.
